specs.canonical_statement: Applied pathology and L11 societal phase-transition claims are bounded to validation targets for criticality, free energy, MS-QEC, and spin-glass dynamics.
executable_validation_targets: map pathology target to deviation from criticality, free-energy accumulation, or MS-QEC failure
map societal phase transitions to L11 spin-glass dynamics
preserve quasicritical sigma equals one as a validation target
null_controls: missing-L11-spin-glass target control must be rejected
roadmap output must not be treated as empirical evidence
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > Applied SCPN and Validation
validation_targets: map pathology target to deviation from criticality, free-energy accumulation, or MS-QEC failure
map societal phase transitions to L11 spin-glass dynamics
preserve quasicritical sigma equals one as a validation target

specs.canonical_statement: Ethical governance and alignment claims are bounded to validation targets for SEC, ethical Lagrangian/CEF, and ethical-functional embedding.
executable_validation_targets: map governance target to SEC maximisation through ethical Lagrangian and CEF
map alignment target to ethical-functional embedding as objective function
record that roadmap classification is not empirical evidence
null_controls: roadmap output must not prescribe deployment
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > Applied SCPN and Validation
validation_targets: map governance target to SEC maximisation through ethical Lagrangian and CEF
map alignment target to ethical-functional embedding as objective function
record that roadmap classification is not empirical evidence

specs.canonical_statement: Stage I prioritises foundational validation: universal quasicriticality, biological quantum-interface tests, and geometry-of-qualia PTA/TDA.
executable_validation_targets: validate universal quasicriticality before higher-level dynamics
validate L1/L2 biological quantum-interface gaps and modulation claims
validate L5 geometry-of-qualia claims with PTA/TDA targets
null_controls: stage-order control must place Stage I before Stage II
roadmap output must not be treated as completed validation
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > Applied SCPN and Validation
validation_targets: validate universal quasicriticality before higher-level dynamics
validate L1/L2 biological quantum-interface gaps and modulation claims
validate L5 geometry-of-qualia claims with PTA/TDA targets

specs.canonical_statement: Stage II prioritises UPDE and HPC mechanisms; Stage III prioritises Gaian coupling and teleology high-level dynamics.
executable_validation_targets: validate UPDE through multi-scale PAC targets
validate L12 Gaian coupling and L15/L8 teleology after mechanism targets
null_controls: stage-order control must place Stage II before Stage III
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > Applied SCPN and Validation
validation_targets: validate UPDE through multi-scale PAC targets
validate L12 Gaian coupling and L15/L8 teleology after mechanism targets

summary.policy: P0R06221-P0R06222 are promoted as source-covered validation-roadmap specifications only. Passing fixtures is not empirical evidence.
